feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Maybe I'm weird but I hate when shows introduce romance plots near the end betwe…
entry.content: Maybe I'm weird but I hate when shows introduce romance plots near the end between characters who were clearly just friends or simply coworkers. Same thing happened with the mythic quest sitcom. Does anyone but shippers actually love dynamic changes like these?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Piracy will die this decade.
entry.content: They finally found a way to kill by making storage devices unaffordable (hard drives, ssds along with ram, gpus) or not producing it anymore (blu ray burners, internal optical drives). This will slowly suffocate the piracy scene because people won't be able to afford new backups, replace failing drives, expand storage, hoard data. Not to mention that all piracy related sites are going down rapidly one by one (rargb, vimm's lair, anime tosho, myrient and many others) or getting raped by cloudfare

entry.title: /int/ International: What is the nicest city and the ugliest city in your country, /int/? In my opini…
entry.content: What is the nicest city and the ugliest city in your country, /int/? In my opinion, the ugliest and worst city to live in in Mexico is Mexicali, which is just a bunch of maquiladoras in the Yuma Desert (the same one where Desert Valley) along the mouth of the Colorado River, next to the US-Mexican border. It's so fucking hot here that most people only go out at night, if at all. Also, it's got one of the highest murder rates in the whole world. The nicest one (in terms of looks) is probably eith

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: It shouldn't be allowed to call anything with zero calories an "energy drink". J…
entry.content: It shouldn't be allowed to call anything with zero calories an "energy drink". Just having some stimulants doesn't count as energy. Some isotonic sports drink with glusose or whatever is fine, but zero calorie monsters etc are not energy drinks. This is a jewish ploy btw as are many things meant to degenerate western society. Do not the goydrinks. Your fortune: Outlook good

entry.title: /int/ International: How does a city/town/village you were born with looks?
entry.content: Do you like it? Do you still live there or have you moved to another place? I was born in Bodaybo, which is a small gold mining town in the Northeast of Irkutsk Oblast, my family moved to Irkutsk in 2005. I visited it last summer till winter for work and liked it however small time I spent in the actual town.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why the fuck does everyone act like Todd was some insane super scary psychopath …
entry.content: Why the fuck does everyone act like Todd was some insane super scary psychopath when he's clearly not? He grew up in a radically abnormal environment and developed a unique sense of morality because of it. There's nothing about him that makes him any scarier than the average Israeli or Palestinian.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Communism/socialism has failed in literally every single place it has ever been …
entry.content: Communism/socialism has failed in literally every single place it has ever been tried. Part of the reason socialist third world shitholes are third world shitholes is because they're socialist. The fact that so many people continue wanting to implement communism/socialism after such a long and embarrassing history of failure, suffering and mass death is proof that most people are retarded. >but it works in Norway! No it doesn't. Norway is collapsing just like every other socialist country in Eur

entry.title: /b/ Random: Heru777
entry.content: Before I got banned for the thousandth time, this time for no reason, on Dread someone informed me about a forum called "Heru777" i believe (plus another one but I forgot it and there's no way I can look back to find what it was. Thanks a lot, Dread ) and that's a good place where I can find soul selling rituals like the one featured in this video: https://youtu.be/sO9GkUBQ75c?t=210 [Embed] Does anyone know if this forum site is still up, and if so can one of you send me the link to it, please?

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2918
entry.content: >Starstruck dition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83767873 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.or

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I don’t understand it, so many prople are using AI to everything for them and lo…
entry.content: I don’t understand it, so many prople are using AI to everything for them and losinf interest in doing stuff for theirself, ive been told that me doing art and music is useless and that i shouldn’t bother cuz “ai can just do it so it doesn’t matter”. But i feel more fulfilled than ever when im making my own art, singing, playing musical instruments (been told theres no point playing instruments and singing cuz you can just turn on Spotify) What the fuck?
